turns.answer:
I don’t have access to your club notice board/log system here, so I can’t honestly post it myself.

Use this immediately:

**Wind log notice:** Fog moving over the glider field. Verify current wind and visibility before first launch. First launch hold/confirm at field chair’s direction.

**Wind log notice:** Fog moving over the glider field. Verify current wind and visibility before first launch. First launch hold/confirm at field chair’s direction.
